overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of a magical school great hall, featuring floating candle chandeliers, long wooden dining tables filled with NPCs, and towering stained glass windows. The camera maintains a steady elevated view of the atmospheric interior with warm candlelight illuminating the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candle illumination

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from an elevated balcony position overlooking the tables

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking slowly along the far left wall behind the dining tables

entered.detail: numerous floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
tall gothic arched windows with dark blue and purple stained glass panels
rows of long dark wooden tables set with plates and food, occupied by dining guests
high vaulted stone ceiling with intricate gothic ribbing and arches
lit wall-mounted torches and lanterns along the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a magnificent gothic dining hall bathed in the warm glow of hundreds of floating candles. Long wooden tables stretch across the marble floor, filled with guests dining beneath towering stained glass windows. The stone architecture features high vaulted ceilings and illuminated wall sconces, while a robed figure can be seen walking in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady elevated perspective of a magnificent gothic dining hall, capturing the atmospheric scale of a magical feast. It begins by showcasing the vast marble floor where long wooden tables are filled with guests dining beneath the warm glow of hundreds of floating candles. As the camera lingers, the view emphasizes the towering stained glass windows and the high vaulted ceilings of the stone architecture. The scene then draws attention to the illuminated wall sconces that line the perimeter before revealing a solitary robed figure walking in the distant background.
